title: L'Oréal × Kinki Kappers
excerpt: Immersive forest projections and live visuals for a large-scale Kinki Kappers show, in collaboration with L'Oréal.
description:
Live visuals and immersive projections for a large-scale Kinki Kappers show, created in collaboration with L'Oréal. Towering “sequoia” forest imagery and shifting colour wrapped the stage, runway and hall — turning a hair-and-fashion spectacle into an enveloping environment of projected light.
Models, dancers and aerial performers moved through the projections, the audience surrounded on all sides by forest, colour and motion.
credits: A Kinki Kappers show, in collaboration with L'Oréal. Projections & live visuals: Studio Schilp.
